name: The Piano That Staying Time
short_description: “Can you play the piano?”Summer vacation starts soon.However, she says that she has rented out the entire music room during the vacation, and instead of postponing the lesson, she proposes one condition...A full-voices visual novel with a theme of memories with emotional music.
detailed_description:
“Can you play the piano?”

The school music room where arduous lessons continue every day.
The teacher who guided me was none other than a female student in the same class as me.

Summer vacation starts soon.
As summer vacation began, I felt relieved that I could take a break from lessons for a while.

However, she says that she has rented out the entire music room during the vacation, and instead of postponing the lesson, she proposes one condition...

Overview
This game is a full-voices visual novel with a theme of memories with emotional music.

Key Features

  • Colorful graphics
    Emotional and high-quality graphic illustrations were used.
  • An good soundtrack
    Using soundtracks composed by developers themselves, it boasts a high synchro rate with the sensitivity of the game.
